mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, session_id, task_type, title, goal, status, execution_mode, search_scope, allow_draft_write, current_step, final_output_summary, error_message, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_task WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, session_id, task_type, title, goal, status, execution_mode, search_scope, allow_draft_write, current_step, final_output_summary, error_message, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_task WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_task ( user_id, session_id, task_type, title, goal, status, execution_mode, search_scope, allow_draft_write, current_step, final_output_summary, error_message, started_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{taskType}, #{title}, #{goal}, #{status}, #{executionMode}, #{searchScope}, #{allowDraftWrite}, #{currentStep}, #{finalOutputSummary}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_task SET user_id = #{task.userId}, session_id = #{task.sessionId}, task_type = #{task.taskType}, title = #{task.title}, goal = #{task.goal}, status = #{task.status}, execution_mode = #{task.executionMode}, search_scope = #{task.searchScope}, allow_draft_write = #{task.allowDraftWrite}, current_step = #{task.currentStep}, final_output_summary = #{task.finalOutputSummary}, error_message = #{task.errorMessage}, started_at = #{task.startedAt}, completed_at = #{task.completedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{task.id}

UPDATE agent_task SET status = COALESCE(#{status}, status), current_step = COALESCE(#{currentStep}, current_step), final_output_summary = COALESCE(#{finalOutputSummary}, final_output_summary), error_message = COALESCE(#{errorMessage}, error_message), started_at = COALESCE(#{startedAt}, started_at), completed_at = COALESCE(#{completedAt}, completed_at), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
